modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to add a new subscriber to my Listserv.

full_description_text: I was trying to add a new subscriber to my Listserv, but it didn't work. I followed the steps, but nothing happened. It's frustrating because I need this done for my group. Can someone help me figure out what's going wrong?
short_description: Unable to add a new subscriber to my Listserv.
description: I was trying to add a new subscriber to my Listserv, but it didn't work. I followed the steps, but nothing happened. It's frustrating because I need this done for my group. Can someone help me figure out what's going wrong?
